name: accounting firms managing 10–50 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, inadequate risk identification causes client financial losses. We automate risk management instead of manual risk assessments and client consultations.
problem_solved: Inability to proactively identify and mitigate financial risks for clients.
